name: l_bracket_extras
description: L-bracket 100x60x5 mm with two 6 mm mounting holes; geometry via extras (v0 schema has no L-shape primary or union). Extras are hand-corrected known-good build123d (the live planner few-shot omits the required BuildLine wrapper around Polyline).
extras:
from build123d import BuildPart, BuildSketch, BuildLine, Plane, Polyline, make_face, extrude, Locations, Hole
with BuildPart() as bp:
    with BuildSketch(Plane.XZ) as sk:
        with BuildLine() as ln:
            Polyline((0, 0), (100, 0), (100, 5), (5, 5), (5, 60), (0, 60), close=True)
        make_face()
    extrude(amount=60)
    with Locations((30, 30, 5), (70, 30, 5)):
        Hole(radius=3, depth=10)
body = bp.part
